description: Silver coloured steel case with a fixed bezel for durability, style and comfortBlack leather strap with a tang clasp, loop and holes to customise FitSilver dial with silver hands, crystal embellishments and a butterfly design on the dial and around the bezeltitan logo at the 12 hour markScrew to reset timeSolid case back for enhanced durabilityWater resistance up to 30 meters, allowing you to use it even when showering Warranty: 2 years
